---
title: "Total Statewide Closure Days, With Wildfire Highlighted"
format:
  html:
    fig-width: 11
    fig-height: 7
    fig-dpi: 180
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(scales)

to_number <- function(x) {
  readr::parse_number(as.character(x), na = c("", "NA", "N/A", "NULL", "*"))
}

safe_divide <- function(num, den) {
  if_else(!is.na(den) & den > 0, num / den, NA_real_)
}

data_file <- "annual_school_closures_standardized_test_scores_ca_2003_2019.csv"
data_path_candidates <- c(
  file.path("..", "data", "raw", "school_fire", data_file),
  file.path("data", "raw", "school_fire", data_file)
)

data_path <- data_path_candidates[file.exists(data_path_candidates)][1]
if (is.na(data_path)) {
  stop("Could not find the closure CSV. Check the relative path from this Quarto file.")
}

closure_data <- readr::read_csv(
  data_path,
  col_types = readr::cols(.default = readr::col_character()),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) |>
  clean_names()

if ("days_wildfires" %in% names(closure_data) && !"days_wildfire" %in% names(closure_data)) {
  closure_data <- closure_data |>
    rename(days_wildfire = days_wildfires)
}

statewide_by_year <- closure_data |>
  mutate(
    year = as.integer(year),
    across(any_of(c("days_wildfire", "days_total")), to_number),
    across(any_of(c("days_wildfire", "days_total")), ~ replace_na(.x, 0))
  ) |>
  group_by(year) |>
  summarise(
    days_wildfire = sum(days_wildfire, na.rm = TRUE),
    days_total = sum(days_total, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    non_wildfire_days = pmax(days_total - days_wildfire, 0),
    wildfire_share = safe_divide(days_wildfire, days_total)
  ) |>
  arrange(year)
```

```{r total-disruption-wildfire-highlight-editorial}
#| fig-width: 11
#| fig-height: 7
year_levels <- statewide_by_year$year

total_with_wildfire_component <- statewide_by_year |>
  transmute(
    year,
    year_index = match(year, year_levels),
    `Non-wildfire days` = non_wildfire_days,
    Wildfire = days_wildfire
  ) |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(`Non-wildfire days`, Wildfire),
    names_to = "component",
    values_to = "closure_days"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    component = factor(component, levels = c("Non-wildfire days", "Wildfire"))
  )

peak_labels <- statewide_by_year |>
  slice_max(days_total, n = 2, with_ties = FALSE) |>
  mutate(
    year_index = match(year, year_levels),
    label = str_glue(
      "{year}\n{label_comma()(days_total)} total days\n{label_percent(accuracy = 1)(wildfire_share)} wildfire"
    )
  )

end_labels <- statewide_by_year |>
  filter(year == max(year, na.rm = TRUE)) |>
  transmute(
    year_index = match(year, year_levels),
    wildfire_y = non_wildfire_days + days_wildfire / 2,
    non_wildfire_y = non_wildfire_days / 2
  )

total_closure_plot <- ggplot(
  total_with_wildfire_component,
  aes(x = year_index, y = closure_days, fill = component)
) +
  geom_col(
    width = 0.72,
    color = "#F8F5EF",
    linewidth = 0.28,
    position = position_stack(reverse = TRUE)
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = peak_labels,
    aes(
      x = year_index,
      xend = year_index,
      y = days_total + 120,
      yend = days_total + 480
    ),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "#8F8B84",
    linewidth = 0.35
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = peak_labels,
    aes(x = year_index, y = days_total + 620, label = label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    family = "sans",
    fontface = "bold",
    size = 3.15,
    lineheight = 0.94,
    color = "#2A2A2A"
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = end_labels,
    aes(x = year_index + 0.65, y = wildfire_y, label = "Wildfire"),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    hjust = 0,
    family = "sans",
    fontface = "bold",
    size = 3.4,
    color = "#B2382E"
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = end_labels,
    aes(x = year_index + 0.65, y = non_wildfire_y, label = "Non-wildfire"),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    hjust = 0,
    family = "sans",
    fontface = "bold",
    size = 3.4,
    color = "#6F6A63"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Non-wildfire days" = "#D7D1C7",
      "Wildfire" = "#B2382E"
    ),
    guide = "none"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq_along(year_levels),
    labels = year_levels,
    expand = expansion(add = c(0.4, 1.55))
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = label_comma(),
    breaks = seq(0, 7000, by = 1000),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.09))
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  labs(
    title = "Wildfire years stand out in California school closures",
    subtitle = "Statewide school closure days by academic-year ending year, 2003-2019. Red marks the portion attributed to wildfire.",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Statewide closure days",
    caption = "Source: Annual school closures and standardized test scores in California, 2003-2019."
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12, base_family = "sans") +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "#DED9D1", linewidth = 0.35),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#F8F5EF", color = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "#F8F5EF", color = NA),
    plot.title = element_text(
      family = "Georgia",
      face = "bold",
      size = 23,
      color = "#111111",
      margin = margin(b = 7)
    ),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(
      size = 10.8,
      color = "#4F4B45",
      margin = margin(b = 24)
    ),
    plot.caption = element_text(
      size = 8.5,
      color = "#6B665F",
      hjust = 0,
      margin = margin(t = 14)
    ),
    axis.title.y = element_text(
      size = 9.5,
      color = "#5B554E",
      margin = margin(r = 8)
    ),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8.5, color = "#4E4A44", margin = margin(t = 6)),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8.5, color = "#5B554E", margin = margin(r = 7)),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "#9B958C", linewidth = 0.25),
    axis.ticks.length.x = unit(3, "pt"),
    axis.line.x = element_line(color = "#2C2C2C", linewidth = 0.35),
    plot.margin = margin(22, 62, 18, 24)
  )

total_closure_plot
```

```{r}
write_csv(statewide_by_year, "statewide_by_year.csv")
```
